description_long: This is a robust, double-headed sledgehammer-style axe with a thick, metallic head featuring two large, rectangular striking faces. The head is adorned with a central circular emblem surrounded by metallic studs, giving it a reinforced and decorative appearance. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of a dark, textured material, possibly metal or reinforced wood, with a patterned grip for secure handling. The base of the handle is capped with a metallic pommel, adding balance and durability. The overall design is heavy-duty, suggesting it is intended for demanding tasks such as demolition or ceremonial use. The color palette consists of muted grays and bronzes, contributing to its industrial and utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A heavy, double-headed sledgehammer-style axe with a metallic head, central emblem, and a long, textured handle capped with a metallic pommel. The design is reinforced and decorative, suitable for demanding urban tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, rectangular striking faces, central emblem, and studded details on the axe head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the axe head and the rectangular profile of one striking face.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the opposite striking face and the symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other edge of the axe head and the depth of the central emblem.
attribute_handle_type: Long, cylindrical handle with a textured, patterned grip; appears straight and made of dark, reinforced material with a metallic pommel.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, rectangular sledgehammer-style head with two large striking faces, central circular emblem, and decorative studs; no sharp blade edges.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged or pinned mounting with visible reinforcement at the head-handle junction.
